name: Four-Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
In a large bowl, gently toss rhubarb, apple, berries, and lemon juice. Combine sugar and flour; stir into the fruit mixture and let stand for 30 minutes. Line a pie plate with the bottom crust. Add filling; dot with butter. Roll out remaining pastry to fit the top of the pie; cut slits in the top. Place over the filling. Seal and flute the edges. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly. Sprinkle with sugar if desired. 6-8 servings
